title: Levein Group Cricket Carnival 2024
excerpt: Cricket Carnival 2024 ❤️ Cricket is more than just a sport in Sri Lanka. It brings people together, builds team spirit, and creates unforgettable moments. At Levein Group, our Cricket Carnival 2024 was one of those special days filled with energy, laughter, and healthy competition. The tournament was organized with 8 teams, and each match...
content:
Cricket Carnival 2024 ❤️

Cricket is more than just a sport in Sri Lanka. It brings people together, builds team spirit, and creates unforgettable moments. At Levein Group, our Cricket Carnival 2024 was one of those special days filled with energy, laughter, and healthy competition.

The tournament was organized with 8 teams, and each match was played as a 6-over game. To make the event more inclusive and exciting, the very first over of each match was played by women, and each team included 2 women players.

It was a great way to celebrate teamwork, participation, and the fun side of our company culture.

How We Played

The day was filled with exciting matches, cheering teams, and friendly competition. Everyone gave their best on the ground, creating a lively and enjoyable atmosphere throughout the tournament.

Our CEO, Tharaka, also joined the game, making the event even more special and memorable for everyone. It was a great moment to see leadership and team members enjoying the same field with the same energy.

Along with the matches, the team also enjoyed lunch together, adding more warmth and connection to the day.

The tournament had a prize pool of LKR 50,000, and after an exciting series of matches, Madhura and Team became the winners of the Levein Group Cricket Carnival 2024.

At Levein Group, events like this remind us that a great workplace is not only built through work, but also through shared experiences, fun, unity, and team spirit.
author: Salman

title: Levein Group Celebrates Aurudu 2026 with Team Spirit and Happiness
excerpt: Aurudu Celebration 2026 Aurudu is a season of happiness, tradition, and fresh beginnings. Across Sri Lanka, it brings people together through cultural activities, festive food, games, and joyful moments. At Levein Group, Aurudu 2026 was celebrated in a simple but meaningful way. It was a beautiful opportunity for our team to come together, relax, and...
content:
Aurudu Celebration 2026

Aurudu is a season of happiness, tradition, and fresh beginnings. Across Sri Lanka, it brings people together through cultural activities, festive food, games, and joyful moments.

At Levein Group, Aurudu 2026 was celebrated in a simple but meaningful way. It was a beautiful opportunity for our team to come together, relax, and enjoy the festive season.

The celebration created a warm and friendly atmosphere, reminding us that workplace culture is also built through shared memories and happy moments.

How We Celebrated

Our team enjoyed the day with smiles, traditional activities, food, and friendly celebrations.

Even though it was a simple celebration, it brought everyone closer as one team. It allowed our employees to connect beyond daily work and enjoy the spirit of Aurudu together.

At Levein Group, we believe unity and happiness are also part of success. Aurudu 2026 became another special moment in our company journey.
author: Salman

title: Celebrating Women’s Day at Levein Group
excerpt: Women’s Day Celebration Women’s Day is a special day celebrated around the world to recognize the strength, achievements, and contribution of women in society. It is also a reminder that women deserve respect, equal opportunities, support, and appreciation in every workplace. At Levein Group, Women’s Day was celebrated with pride and happiness. It was a...
content:
Women’s Day Celebration

Women’s Day is a special day celebrated around the world to recognize the strength, achievements, and contribution of women in society. It is also a reminder that women deserve respect, equal opportunities, support, and appreciation in every workplace.

At Levein Group, Women’s Day was celebrated with pride and happiness. It was a meaningful moment to appreciate the amazing women who are part of our company journey.

The women at Levein Group bring talent, creativity, leadership, patience, and strength to our workplace. Their contribution plays an important role in our growth and success.

How We Appreciated

Our Women’s Day celebration was filled with appreciation, smiles, and meaningful moments. It gave us the chance to recognize the value of every woman in our company.

At Levein Group, we believe women should be encouraged, respected, and empowered in every field. Their strength makes our company stronger, and their ideas help us move forward.

Women’s Day was not just a celebration for us. It was a reminder to continue building a workplace where everyone feels valued, supported, and respected.

title: Levein Group Extends Support to Families Affected by the Ditwah 2025 Incident
excerpt: Ditwah Incident 2025 The Ditwah 2025 incident was a difficult time for many families in Sri Lanka. Many people faced challenges due to heavy rain, floods, landslides, and the damage caused to their homes and daily lives. During moments like this, support from the community becomes very important. Even a small act of kindness can...
content:
Ditwah Incident 2025

The Ditwah 2025 incident was a difficult time for many families in Sri Lanka. Many people faced challenges due to heavy rain, floods, landslides, and the damage caused to their homes and daily lives.

During moments like this, support from the community becomes very important. Even a small act of kindness can bring hope, strength, and comfort to people who are going through a hard time.

At Levein Group, we believe success is not only about business growth. It is also about giving back to society and standing with people when they need support the most.

How We do that?

Levein Group stepped forward to support the families affected by the Ditwah 2025 incident through a donation initiative.

Our team contributed essential items to help people who were facing hardship during this challenging period. This initiative was not just about giving donations. It was about showing care, kindness, and humanity.

We are proud of our team members who came together to make this donation possible. Their generosity reflects the values we carry as a company.

At Levein Group, we will continue to support meaningful causes and contribute to the community whenever we can. Because real growth happens when we grow together with society.
author: Salman

title: Levein Group Celebrates Aurudu 2025 with Joy, Unity, and Tradition
excerpt: Aurudu Celebration 2025 Aurudu, also known as the Sinhala and Tamil New Year, is one of the most meaningful celebrations in Sri Lanka. It is a season of new beginnings, family, culture, traditional food, games, and happiness. At Levein Group, Aurudu 2025 was celebrated with the same beautiful spirit. Our team came together to enjoy...
content:
Aurudu Celebration 2025

Aurudu, also known as the Sinhala and Tamil New Year, is one of the most meaningful celebrations in Sri Lanka. It is a season of new beginnings, family, culture, traditional food, games, and happiness.

At Levein Group, Aurudu 2025 was celebrated with the same beautiful spirit. Our team came together to enjoy a joyful day filled with laughter, unity, and traditional celebrations.

The event gave everyone a chance to take a break from daily work, connect with each other, and celebrate Sri Lankan culture as one team.

How We Celebrated

Our Aurudu celebration included traditional games, festive food, music, and fun moments shared among our team members.

Everyone joined with great energy, making the day more colourful and memorable. It was not just a celebration, but a reminder of how important teamwork, friendship, and togetherness are in our company culture.

At Levein Group, we believe moments like these help build stronger bonds within the workplace. Aurudu 2025 became another beautiful memory in our journey as one Levein family.
author: Salman

title: Levein Group Award Night 2024
excerpt: Award Night 2024 Every company grows because of the people behind it. Their dedication, hard work, discipline, and teamwork help turn goals into real achievements. The Levein Group Award Night 2024 was a proud and memorable evening organized to appreciate our employees and celebrate their contribution to the company. It was a special night filled...
content:
Award Night 2024

Every company grows because of the people behind it. Their dedication, hard work, discipline, and teamwork help turn goals into real achievements.

The Levein Group Award Night 2024 was a proud and memorable evening organized to appreciate our employees and celebrate their contribution to the company.

It was a special night filled with recognition, motivation, and gratitude. The event reminded everyone that every role matters and every effort counts.

How We Appreciated Our Team

During the award night, employees were recognized with medals, certificates, and special appreciation for their dedication and performance.

The event was not only about awards. It was about saying thank you to the people who continue to support the growth of Levein Group with commitment and passion.

At Levein Group, we believe appreciation is an important part of a strong workplace culture. Award Night 2024 became a meaningful celebration of teamwork, excellence, and success.

We are proud of our employees and grateful for their continued contribution to our company journey.
author: Salman
